summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hireabble's new features: photo upload, messaging system, job filtering, and UI components. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% pass rate), but frontend authentication flow has redirection issues preventing dashboard access.

ui_bugs.issue: User remains on login page after successful authentication instead of being redirected to dashboard
Cannot reach main dashboard features (filtering, swiping, matches) due to authentication routing issue

integration_issues.issue: Successful login does not redirect to dashboard, blocks testing of main features

passed_tests: Job filtering with query params (job_type, experience_level, salary_min, location)
Stats endpoints for both user types
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication routing issue - users cannot access dashboard after successful login. The login API works correctly but post-authentication redirection to dashboard is failing. All backend APIs for new features (photo upload, messaging, job filtering) are working perfectly.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 37 API tests passed including new messaging, photo upload, and filtering features
success_percentage.frontend: 30% - Registration and onboarding photo upload work, but authentication routing blocks access to main features
